THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOKS, MARCI JOHNSON, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 212-A GRANADA AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,252.24 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $177.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,929.24, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION OF JUDGMNT STAYED IF DEFTS MAKE INSTALLMENT PMTS ON BACK RENT & DMGS TOTAL; SEE JUDGMNT. IF PMTS NOT MADE WITHIN 3 DAYS, PLTF MAY EXECUTE JUDGMNT W/OUT FURTHER NOTICE. IF ALL PMTS MADE TIMELY, PLTF WILL ENTER SATIS- FACTION OF JUDGMNT. SEE JUDGMNT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
